nasb.text: Blessed be the Lord, the God of Israel, From everlasting even to everlasting. Then all the people said, “Amen,” and praised the Lord.

esv.text: Blessed be the Lord, the God of Israel, from everlasting to everlasting!” Then all the people said, “Amen!” and praised the Lord.

cnv.text: 耶和華以色列的　神是應當稱頌的， 從永遠直到永遠。” 全體人民都說阿們，並且讚美耶和華。

ccb.text: 从亘古到永远， 以色列的上帝耶和华当受称颂！” 众民都说：“阿们”， 并赞美耶和华。
